project_type: Next.js 16 App Router with Supabase backend
build_system: npm with Next.js CLI. Node v22 available at /root/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.3/bin. Must prepend to PATH: export PATH="/root/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.3/bin:$PATH"
test_framework: No test framework configured yet. Verification via build + lint.
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to install dependencies. 2. Run npm run build to confirm build passes. 3. Run npm run lint to confirm no lint errors.
environment_constraints: Node.js not on default PATH - must export PATH with /root/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.3/bin. OPEN_INTERNET network mode - npm registry accessible. node_modules not yet installed (need npm install).
contribution_requirements: AGENTS.md says to read node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing code (if that directory exists after install). Use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes and semantic HTML for all layout sections (from steering file).
key_patterns: Next.js 16.2.4 App Router, Tailwind CSS 4 via @tailwindcss/postcss, path alias @/* mapped to project root, Geist font loaded in layout.tsx, dark mode support via prefers-color-scheme media query in globals.css.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages and layouts. public/ - static assets (SVGs). Root - config files (tsconfig, next.config, eslint, postcss).
